payload.answer: Proceeding with durable commit of 5 atomized memory cards adhering to schema constraints. Ambiguity preserved; no conflicts detected.
citations: Schema requirements (strict JSON output, no Markdown wrapping)
Durability rules (preserve ambiguity, exclude superseded/deleted facts)

entity_resolution.reason: No explicit resolution provided for ambiguous statements in input.

memory_cards.statement: Brain's memory system supports atomization of large tables (e.g., CSV rows) into discrete memory cards.
Only one JSON object per response is permitted; no Markdown wrapping.
Durable memory commits must preserve ambiguity unless explicitly resolved.
Superseded or deleted facts must never be presented as current.
